name: Iran
description: Iran faces escalating tensions with Israel and Gulf states. Nuclear program at critical juncture. Proxy network activation ongoing. Post-Gaza conflict posture shifted.

recent_incident.summary: Iran-backed Houthi forces fired ballistic missiles at Red Sea commercial shipping.

name: Israel
description: Israel continues military operations in Gaza and conducts periodic strikes in Lebanon and Syria. Iran nuclear threat drives defense posture. ICC warrants impact diplomacy.

recent_incident.summary: Israeli airstrikes conducted on reported weapons depots in southern Lebanon.

name: Gaza
description: Active war zone. Humanitarian catastrophe. IDF operations ongoing. 1.9 million displaced. 14 of 36 hospitals functional. Famine conditions in north.

recent_incident.summary: Ongoing military operations in northern Gaza. Aid trucks: 28 of 500 needed.

name: Lebanon
description: Post-ceasefire fragility. Hezbollah rebuilding. Periodic Israeli strikes on weapons transfers. Lebanese state authority weak. Economic collapse ongoing.

recent_incident.summary: Israeli airstrike near Beirut southern suburbs targeted Hezbollah weapons storage.

name: Syria
description: Post-Assad transition fragile. Multiple armed factions. Israeli strikes on remaining Iranian assets continuing. Turkish and Kurdish forces active. HTS governance contested.

recent_incident.summary: Israeli airstrikes hit Iranian weapons convoys near Damascus.

name: Yemen
description: Houthi forces control northwest Yemen including Sanaa. Active Red Sea campaign targeting commercial shipping. US/UK airstrikes ongoing. Humanitarian crisis severe.

recent_incident.summary: Houthi forces fired ballistic missiles targeting US naval vessels in Red Sea.

name: Iraq
description: Iran-backed militia groups conduct periodic drone and rocket attacks on US bases. ISIS remnants active in central Iraq. Government sovereignty challenged by militia actors.

recent_incident.summary: Iran-backed militia fired rockets at US base in Erbil, no casualties reported.

name: Jordan
description: Jordan faces spillover from Gaza conflict. Protest pressure on government over Gaza. Intercepted Iranian drone strikes passing through Jordanian airspace. Economic stress.

recent_incident.summary: Jordan intercepted drones in its airspace linked to Iranian proxy network.

name: Saudi Arabia
description: Saudi Arabia normalization with Israel on hold post-Gaza. Houthi missile threat to oil infrastructure. China-brokered Iran-Saudi deal fragile but holding. Vision 2030 at risk.

recent_incident.summary: Saudi Aramco oil infrastructure placed on heightened security alert amid Houthi threats.

name: UAE
description: UAE faces lower direct threat but remains exposed to Houthi missile range and regional tensions. Abraham Accords complicated by Gaza conflict. Trade hub at risk.

recent_incident.summary: UAE enhanced port security after Houthi threats to Gulf shipping.
